title: Portable Agent Protocol Knowledge Entry Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating the YAML front-matter of .agent/knowledge_base/*.md

id.description: Unique, machine-readable identifier of the knowledge entry.

title.description: Human-readable title of the knowledge entry.

tags.description: Metadata tags categorizing this knowledge entry.

created.description: Creation date of the entry (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD).

updated.description: Last updated date of the entry (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD).
